basic_details.short_information: Indian Air Force AFCAT 02/2026 Recruitment notification is out for 379 Commissioned Officer vacancies in Flying Branch and Ground Duty (Technical & Non-Technical) branches. Eligible candidates can apply online from 20-05-2026 to 19-06-2026 through the official website: afcat.cdac.in

age_limit.age_details: 20 to 26 years as on 01 July 2027 i.e. born between 02 July 2001 and 01 July 2007 (both dates inclusive).

qualification.education_qualification: Candidates debarred by MoD from any Defence commission, those with criminal convictions or ongoing criminal cases, and those removed from NDA/IMA/AFA/INA/OTAs for indiscipline are ineligible.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the AFCAT website; no other mode is accepted. Aadhaar Card is mandatory for online registration, and candidates should use valid email ID and mobile number, which must remain active throughout the selection process.
seo_tags: Indian Air Force AFCAT 02/2026 Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online For 379 Posts
